narrative: Reports of Iran targeting American ships in the Strait of Hormuz introduce a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY at 159.21 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry persists despite the headline shock; gold steady -0.02%; equities +0.58%; DXY -0.21%; VIX 15.7. NZD/JPY bilateral divergence (+1.07% spread) remains the dominant G8 theme as softer US PCE data pressures yields. Watch Tokyo CPI at 23:30 UTC for JPY directional cues.
